GitHub

Plotting

Plotting functions are implemented by the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension. Load CairoMakie before using these entry points in a Julia session.

ScQubitsMimic.plot_evals_vs_paramvals — Function
plot_evals_vs_paramvals(sweep; kwargs...) -> Figure

Plot eigenvalue traces from a SingleSystemSweep or ParameterSweep.

The plotting methods are provided by the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension and require CairoMakie to be loaded.

source
ScQubitsMimic.plot_matrixelements — Function
plot_matrixelements(sys, op; kwargs...) -> Figure

Plot a matrix-element heatmap for an operator acting on a supported quantum system.

This plotting entry point is implemented by the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension and requires CairoMakie.

source
ScQubitsMimic.plot_wavefunction — Function
plot_wavefunction(sys, which=1; kwargs...) -> Figure

Plot one or more 1D qubit wavefunctions using the Makie extension backend. Requires CairoMakie and the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension.

source
ScQubitsMimic.plot_chi_vs_paramvals — Function
plot_chi_vs_paramvals(sweep::ParameterSweep; kwargs...) -> Figure

Plot dispersive χ values extracted from a sweep with stored lookup data. Implemented by the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension and requires CairoMakie.

source
ScQubitsMimic.plot_transitions — Function
plot_transitions(sweep_or_slice; kwargs...) -> Figure

Plot transition energies from a one-dimensional ParameterSweep or a SweepSlice.

This plotting entry point is implemented by the ScQubitsMimicMakieExt extension and requires CairoMakie.

source
